series_metadata.series_title: Soil Profile and Structural Foundation Prints
series_metadata.series_description: Prints of soil profiles and structural foundation investigations 22" x 36" (plan size) with more recent prints at 22" x 34" and 11" x 17". Prints contain graphical presentation of soil borings and tests.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper documents scanned ODOT network drive. Documents may be destroyed files have been checked complete . ; Electronic: permanently in electronic database
